assignments.name: Set_Base_Date_And_Lead
assignments.label: Set Base Date and Project Lead

assignments.name: Build_Task_00
assignments.label: Build Task 01: Scope reviewed and clear

assignments.name: Build_Task_07
assignments.label: Build Task 08: R&R rotation scheduled and covered

assignments.name: Build_Task_09
assignments.label: Build Task 10: Site-specific safety plan complete

assignments.name: Build_Task_10
assignments.label: Build Task 11: PPE and uniforms confirmed and in-stock

value.stringValue: PPE and uniforms confirmed and in-stock

assignments.name: Build_Task_14
assignments.label: Build Task 15: Crew trained for scope

assignments.name: Build_Task_16
assignments.label: Build Task 17: SSE identified and training scheduled

assignments.name: Build_Task_20
assignments.label: Build Task 21: Flights and ground transport booked

assignments.name: Build_Task_22
assignments.label: Build Task 23: Delivery coordinated with site

assignments.name: Build_Task_24
assignments.label: Build Task 25: Daily production targets set

assignments.name: Build_Task_26
assignments.label: Build Task 27: Scope confirmed with client

assignments.name: Build_Task_29
assignments.label: Build Task 30: Pre-Mob sign-off: ready to mobilize

decisions.name: Cond_Task_16
decisions.label: Conditional Task 17: SSE identified and training scheduled

decisions.name: Cond_Task_20
decisions.label: Conditional Task 21: Flights and ground transport booked

Flow.description: Record-triggered flow on Project__c (Work Order) create. Generates the canonical Pre-Mob task checklist as Task records related to the Work Order, with owners, due dates offset from Mobilization_Date__c, and gate flags. Conditional tasks gate on Requires_New_Hires__c and Method_of_Mobilization__c. Generated by scripts/generate_premob_flow.py.
Flow.label: Generate Pre-Mob Tasks
